About Us

Welcome to Fightpur 💜
A smart practice platform built for students preparing for gamified hiring assessments used by top recruiters.

🧠

Logical Thinking

Solve problems with better logic and accuracy.

🔍

Inductive & Deductive Reasoning

Identify patterns and draw correct conclusions.

🎯

Focus & Attention

Improve concentration and stay focused under pressure.

⚡

Reaction Speed

Respond faster and improve your reflexes.

🧾

Memory Accuracy

Enhance memory and recall information quickly.

🎮

Multi-tasking Skills

Handle multiple tasks efficiently and effectively.

▦Grid Challenge ▶Motion Challenge ◐Switch Challenge #Digit Challenge ✳Pattern & Logic
🚀

Why We Built This

Many students struggle because these rounds differ from traditional aptitude tests. Questions change quickly, pressure increases, and speed matters as much as accuracy. We built Fightpur so students can practice unlimited unique challenges and improve before the real assessment.

What Makes Us Different

🎲
Randomly Generated

Every time a new experience.

📊
Real-time Score & Accuracy

Track your performance instantly.

🧠
Brain Training Focused

Games designed to train your brain.

📈
Performance Analytics

Detailed insights to help you improve.

⚙️
Simple, Fast & Distraction-free

Clean interface for better practice.

Our mission is simple: Help students become faster, sharper, and more confident in modern hiring assessments.

Feedback

Your feedback helps improve the games. Please send your comments below.

Deductive Challenge

At the beginning of the game, a matrix like 3×3, 4×4, 5×5 etc. is displayed on the screen with different symbols. To complete the matrix, you must select the appropriate symbols from the options given below. Neither a row nor a column should contain similar symbols.

⚡ HOW TO PLAY

🕒

Time Duration

4 Minutes

Rules

  • No row can contain duplicate symbols.
  • No column can contain duplicate symbols.
  • Fill ? cells using the given options.
  • Think carefully before selecting.

Scoring

  • +3 point for every correct answer.
  • -1 point for every incorrect answer.

▦ EXAMPLE MATRICES

3 × 3 MATRIX

+ ■ ● ● + ■ ? ●

Options:

+ ■ ●

4 × 4 MATRIX

+ ■ ● ★ ● ★ + ■ + ● ★ ? ■ +

Options:

+ ■ ● ★

5 × 5 MATRIX

+ ■ ● ★ ▲ ★ ● ▲ ? ■ + ★ ● ● ▲ ■ + + ● ■

Options:

+ ■ ● ★ ▲
💡

Tip

Each symbol is unique in every row and column. Use logic and eliminate options to find the correct symbol for this place (?).

Switch Challenge

In this challenge, different symbols are displayed as an input code and output code. You need to understand the relationship between the symbols and determine the correct sequence of the output. Choose the correct code from the answer options based on the given input order.

⚡ HOW TO PLAY

🕒

Time Duration

4 Minutes

Rules

  • Observe the input symbols carefully.
  • Understand the order transformation between input and output.
  • Find the correct output code.
  • Select the correct answer from the Answer Panel.

Scoring

  • +3 points for every correct answer.
  • -1 point for every incorrect answer.

▦ EXAMPLE

Input Code

🟢
1
🟥
2
🔺
3
➕
4
Answer : 3 2 4 1

Output Code

🔺
🟥
➕
🟢

Options

💡

Tip

Understand the mapping between input positions and output positions; map indices and eliminate impossible choices.

Inductive Challenge

Recognition

In this challenge, two grids with different shapes are shown. The second grid contains a small change from the first grid. Your task is to identify the rule followed between these two grids. After understanding the pattern change, select the two grids from the given options that follow the same rule.

🎮 HOW TO PLAY

⏱

Time Duration

30 seconds per level

🧠 Rules

  • Observe the first two example grids.
  • Identify how the shapes changed.
  • Find the hidden transformation rule.
  • Compare the answer grids.
  • Select the two grids following the same rule.

🎯 Scoring

  • +3 points for every correct answer.
  • -1 point for every incorrect answer.

▦ Example Task

These two grids follow a rule.

Which two of these grids follow the same rule?

Tip

Look for shape movement, position changes, row and column patterns, and shape replacement rules. Find the relationship first, then choose matching grids.

Game Title

    Grid Challenge

    Power of Attention, Memory

    At the beginning of the game, multiple circles appear randomly on the screen. One circle will blink for a short time and you must remember its position. After that, two grid patterns will be displayed and you need to decide whether both patterns are identical after rotation or not. After completing the pattern task, select the remembered circles in the correct order.

    🎮 How To Play

    ⏱

    Time Duration

    4 Minutes

    🧠 Memory Phase

    • Observe the highlighted circle carefully.
    • Remember the blinking dot position.
    • Multiple positions need to be remembered in sequence.

    🔳 Pattern Phase

    • Compare two grid patterns.
    • Check whether they are identical after rotation.
    • Select YES or NO.

    🎯 Scoring

    • +3 points for every correct answer.
    • -1 point for every incorrect answer.

    ▦ EXAMPLE TASKS

    Memory Challenge

    Remember highlighted dot sequence

    Pattern Comparison (symmetry)

    Rotated but identical?

    💡

    Tip

    Use rotation symmetry to compare patterns quickly and remember highlighted positions using a mental grid.
